ar.page_meta.title: Onboarding
ar.safeguarding.confirmation.activation_bro: A coordinator will review messages you send and receive.
ar.safeguarding.confirmation.activation_dis: You will be hidden from discovery for members who have not completed the required vetting.
ar.safeguarding.confirmation.activation_mat: A coordinator will approve matches involving you before they are suggested to the other member.
ar.safeguarding.confirmation.activation_non: No automatic protections activate from these selections. Your preferences are recorded for coordinator awareness.
ar.safeguarding.confirmation.activation_not: A coordinator has been notified and will be in touch to discuss how we can help.
ar.safeguarding.confirmation.declination_in: Thank you for reviewing these options. Your response has been saved so coordinators know you have seen and considered this step.
ar.safeguarding.confirmation.intro: Thank you for sharing this. Here is a summary of what you chose, who can see it, and what activates as a result.
ar.safeguarding.confirmation.no_selections: You did not select any safeguarding options.
ar.safeguarding.confirmation.revoke_body: You can review or revoke any of these preferences any time from your profile settings. You do not need to ask an administrator to do this.
ar.safeguarding.confirmation.revoke_heading: How to change or revoke these at any time
ar.safeguarding.confirmation.title: Your safeguarding preferences have been saved
ar.safeguarding.confirmation.who_can_see_bo: Only the community coordinators and administrators can see these preferences. Other members cannot. All access is logged.
ar.safeguarding_gdpr_notice: This information is classified as sensitive personal data. We collect it solely to ensure your safety during community exchanges. Your selections are stored with a consent record and can be changed at any time from your settings. Only community coordinators and administrators can view your responses.
ar.safeguarding_intro: Your safety matters to us. If you consider yourself a vulnerable adult, or if you would like additional support when using this community, please let us know below. Our coordinators can arrange safeguarded exchanges, mediate contact on your behalf, and ensure you are matched with appropriately vetted members. Your responses are confidential and only visible to community coordinators — never on your public profile.
ar.safeguarding_subtitle: Let us know if you'd like additional support
